about.title: About Finance ISL
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Source for Islamic Finance Knowledge
about.description: Finance ISL is a comprehensive educational platform dedicated to promoting understanding of Islamic finance, business ethics, and Sharia-compliant economic principles. We provide high-quality content, research, and resources for students, professionals, and anyone interested in ethical financial systems.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To democratize access to Islamic finance education and empower individuals and organizations with knowledge of ethical, Sharia-compliant financial systems that promote justice, transparency, and shared prosperity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the world's leading digital platform for Islamic finance education, fostering a global community of informed practitioners, scholars, and enthusiasts who drive positive change in the financial industry.

values.title: Knowledge (Ilm)
values.description: We believe in the transformative power of education and strive to make Islamic finance knowledge accessible to all.

values.title: Integrity (Amanah)
values.description: We uphold the highest standards of accuracy, honesty, and transparency in all our content and interactions.

values.title: Excellence (Ihsan)
values.description: We pursue excellence in everything we do, from research to content creation to user experience.

values.title: Community (Ummah)
values.description: We foster a supportive learning community where ideas are shared and growth is encouraged.

values.title: Innovation (Ibtikar)
values.description: We embrace innovation while staying true to timeless Islamic principles and values.

values.title: Service (Khidmah)
values.description: We are committed to serving the community and contributing to the development of Islamic finance globally.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Finance ISL is powered by a diverse team of Islamic finance scholars, researchers, writers, and technology professionals dedicated to creating valuable educational content.

members.name: Dr. Ahmad Hassan
members.bio: Dr. Ahmad has over 20 years of experience in Islamic finance academia and consulting. He holds a PhD in Islamic Economics from the International Islamic University Malaysia.

members.name: Dr. Fatima Al-Rashid
members.bio: Dr. Fatima is a professor of Islamic Economics with extensive research on contemporary applications of Islamic financial principles.

members.name: Sheikh Abdullah Ibrahim
members.bio: Sheikh Abdullah is a qualified Islamic jurist specializing in financial transactions and Sharia compliance.

members.name: Sarah Abdullah
members.bio: Sarah brings 15 years of experience in digital marketing and content strategy, with a focus on ethical business practices.

milestones.event: Finance ISL founded with the goal of making Islamic finance education accessible globally.
Launched comprehensive Islamic finance glossary with 500+ terms.
Introduced downloadable resources and learning materials.
Expanded to cover business management and ethics alongside Islamic finance.
Launched interactive learning tools and case studies.
Redesigned platform with enhanced user experience and PWA support.

partners.name: AAOIFI
partners.description: Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions

partners.name: ISRA
partners.description: International Sharia Research Academy for Islamic Finance

partners.name: INCEIF
partners.description: International Centre for Education in Islamic Finance
